_description: Image manifest for AI generation. Each entry describes an image the site needs. Run generate_images.py to produce real images via Gemini API.

images.prompt: A modern SaaS product dashboard interface showing analytics charts and data visualizations on a clean white background
images.alt: Product dashboard showing real-time analytics and key metrics
images.context: Homepage hero section, above the fold, primary visual
images.style: photorealistic product screenshot, clean UI, professional

images.prompt: A minimal abstract illustration representing speed and performance — clean geometric shapes suggesting motion and acceleration
Open Graph social share card: bold headline 'Site Name' with tagline below, brand color accent bar, clean professional layout suitable for social media preview
images.alt: Site Name — tagline for social sharing
images.context: Open Graph image for homepage social sharing
